view.title: View Orbital Platform {id}
view.reinstallNote: You can reinstall from the port navigation menu
view.cpanelNote: Control panel must be installed on a clean Operating System installation with no modifications. Any existing data will be lost during this process.
view.resendWelcomeEmailConfirm: Are you sure you want to retransmit the welcome subspace message?
view.emailSentMessage: The welcome subspace transmission has been resent. Check your comm channel.

order.title: Requisition Orbital Platform
order.rootPasswordNote: Note: Security Clearance Code must contain at least 8 characters, one lowercase letter, one uppercase letter, one numeral, and a special character.
order.subscriptionRenewal: The subscription will automatically renew after {period} at {cost} until decommissioned.
order.tosAcknowledgment: By confirming this box, you acknowledge that you are acquiring a subscription service that automatically renews and is charged to the Credit Chip you provide today. If you wish to cancel your auto-renewal, you may access the fleet portal select the active service and activate the Abort link or transmit to: billing{'@'}interserver.net or use another method outlined in the Federation Terms and Conditions. By confirming the box and activating Place My Requisition below, you also acknowledge you have read, understand, and agree to our Federation Terms and Conditions and Privacy Policy.
order.tosAgree: I have reviewed the terms above and I agree.

buyIp.title: Additional Network Beacon Addon for your Orbital Platform

buyHdSpace.title: Additional Orbital Platform Storage Capacity
buyHdSpace.spaceNote: Minimum 1 up to 100GB additional storage capacity can be acquired

changeRootPassword.title: Change Orbital Platform Root Access Clearance Code
changeRootPassword.passwordMismatch: Encryption Passphrase and Confirmation do not match

changeTimezone.title: Change {module} Galactic Time Zone
changeTimezone.importantNote1: You should completely shut down your {module} before changing the galactic time zone.
changeTimezone.importantNote2: Orbital Platform will be powered down and relaunched during this process.
changeTimezone.importantNote3: The time zone on this panel will always default to America/New_York regardless of what your station is configured to.

changeWebuzoPassword.title: Change Webuzo Admin Encryption Passphrase
changeWebuzoPassword.passwordMismatch: Encryption Passphrase and Confirmation do not match

reinstallOs.title: Reinstall Operating System
reinstallOs.importantNote1: Reinstalling the Operating System will purge all data from the storage drive.
reinstallOs.importantNote2: Before reinstalling the Operating System, please archive a backup to the Deep Space Vault.
reinstallOs.confirmReinstall: Affirmative — I want to reinstall the Operating System!

resetPassword.title: Reset Orbital Platform Security Clearance Code
resetPassword.windowsWarning: Windows security clearance reset will result in an unclean shutdown. Please consider this a last resort option. Verify via VNC that no updates are currently running. If an update is running VNC will display: Windows is applying updates, do not shut down. Shutting down in this state can result in an unbootable station.
resetPassword.confirmReset: Affirmative — I want to Reset the Security Clearance Code!

reverseDns.title: Reverse Navigation Registry
reverseDns.dnsChangeNote: Changes to Reverse Navigation Registry take up to one standard hour to propagate.

vnc.remoteDesktopDescription: Available only on the Windows Platform. Remote desktop provides a quick and convenient method to connect to a virtual station's display interface.
vnc.remoteDesktopStep1: The Administrator security clearance code must first be configured on the Orbital Platform before you can use remote desktop.
vnc.remoteDesktopStep2: Connect via VNC or HTML5 VNC to configure your initial security clearance code.
vnc.remoteDesktopNote: For a remote desktop tutorial navigate
vnc.desktopVncDescription: VNC allows you to connect to the virtual station's display interface. VNC can be operated in the browser or as a standalone client. Your computer's Network Beacon Address must be granted access before the connection can be established.
vnc.grantIpAccess: Grant Your Network Beacon access to VNC
vnc.grantIpWait: Processing... standby, Officer... Allow 2 minutes for the operation to complete.
vnc.vncClientNote: You may also download one of the many VNC clients available across the Federation datanet. We recommend TightVNC. Connect using your Orbital Platform Network Beacon Address. Security clearance code is not required after your remote Network Beacon Address has been granted in step 1.
vnc.connectHtml5: To connect using HTML5 VNC Client:
vnc.html5Note: HTML5 VNC client compatible with any modern browser including mobile browsers (iOS and Android).

setupVnc.title: Configure VNC
setupVnc.ipToGrant: Network Beacon to grant VNC access
setupVnc.grantAccess: Grant VNC Access to Network Beacon

insertCd.insertIso: Insert ISO Image into CDROM Drive
insertCd.urlPlaceholder: Enter a CD or DVD ISO Navigation URL

backup.backupsPartitionNote: Deep Space Vault backups will only function with default partition configurations.
backup.confirmBackup: Do you really want to archive a backup to the Deep Space Vault?
backup.noBackup: No deep space archive currently exists

backups.title: Manage Orbital Platform Deep Space Archives

restore.offlineNote: Your station will be offline while it replaces all current data files with those from the archive. Please contact Fleet Support Command with any questions.
restore.loginPasswordLabel: Enter Login Encryption Passphrase to Validate Restore Operation.
restore.confirmRestore: Do you really want to restore from this deep space archive?

trafficUsage.title: Transmission Bandwidth / Traffic Usage
trafficUsage.billingNote: This is not used for credits calculations and is an estimate only based on your virtual network cards.

slices.title: Upgrade / Downgrade Warp Slices
slices.slicesNote: Up to 32 Warp Slices can be allocated to an Orbital Platform.
slices.proratedNote: Prorated credits to be transferred now.
slices.recurringBillNote: Recurring resource allocation will change by this amount
slices.newInvoiceNote: New resource allocation notices will cost this much
slices.confirmLabel: Affirmative — I want to proceed with this operation.
